person.name: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
It was not Bartrum's sources which erred, but his linking of two different citations: One group of citations[1] yield
"Owain Glyndwr ap Gruffudd Fychan ap Gruffudd",
while another group[2] mention a
"Gruffudd Fychan ap Gruffudd ap Madog Fychan ap Madog Crupl" (born 1350).
But these two groups of citations actually refer to two different men named Gruffudd Fychan ap Gruffudd; one is the father of Owain Glyndwr and the other is a 2nd cousin of Owain:

1st. Gruffudd Maelor II (1195)
2nd. Gruffudd Fychan ap Maelor(Fychan or Farwn Gwyn) (1225)
3rd. Madog Crupl (1260)
4th. Madog Fychan (1290)
5th. Gruffudd (1320)
6th. Gruffudd Fychan I (1350)
Gruffudd Fychan ap Gruffudd ap Madog Fychan ap Madog Crupl
4th. Gruffudd ap Madog Crupl (1295)
5th. Gruffudd Fychan II (1325)
Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffud ap Madog Crupl
6th. Owain Glyndwr (1359)[3][4]
Sources
↑ [7] Pen. 128, 178a; Pen. 129, 88; Pen. 127, 114 & 212 - The Ancestry of Owain Glyndŵr
↑ [8] Pen. 127, 29; Pen. 129, 59 & 68 - The Ancestry of Owain Glyndŵr
↑ The Ancestry of Owain Glyndŵr Ancient Wales Studies, by Darrell Wolcott. entered 2013-12-08 by Michelle
↑ Entered by Michelle Brooks.

zh.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan是Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy和Unknown的兒子，於大約1260年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾莫希爾。他和Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1304年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾海利享年45歲，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾利藍希利奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan是Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy和Unknown的儿子，于大约1260年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾莫希爾。他和Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1304年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾海利享年45岁，埋葬在威尔士丹比爾利藍希利奧。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

nameMeanings.name: Crupl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant (metathesized form) of   Curl  . This surname has now died out in Britain.

variants.name: Curl
meanings: Originally an Anglicized spelling of the German name   Kurt  , but now also used as a short form of   Curtis .

en.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan was born about 1260, in Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy and Unknown. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan. He died in 1304, in Heighley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan est né environ 1260, à Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy et Unknown. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan. Il est décédé en 1304, à Heighley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan wurde um 1260 in Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy und Unknown geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1304 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Heighley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan è nato il circa 1260 nel Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy e Unknown. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan. Morì nel 1304, nel Heighley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychanは約1260年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアマースイルでGruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord GlyndwrdwyとUnknownの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychanとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1304年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアヘイグhリーで45歳で死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアラントイシリオにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan(은)는 대략 1260년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 머스이르에서 Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy(와)과 Unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 헤이리에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랜티실리오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom filho de Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy e Unknown. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan. Ele faleceu em 1304, em Heighley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan родился около 1260 г. в местности миртир, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy и Unknown. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan. Он умер в 1304 г. в местности хигли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности ллантисилио, денбаишир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan nació aproximadamente 1260, en Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy y Unknown. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan. Murió en 1304, en Heighley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Llantysilio, Denbighshire, Gales.
